reconstruction_confidence_reason: Mistral AI has published limited behavioral documentation. Reconstruction relies on API documentation, the company's blog posts, and behavioral analysis. The open-weight Mixtral models provide insight into training methodology.

sources.title: Mistral Large 2 — Frontier AI in Your Hands
Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model

notes: Mistral Large 2 is notable for using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) rather than RLHF, which produces measurably different behavioral patterns — particularly in instruction following precision and response consistency. Mistral AI's European base and GDPR orientation creates a distinct privacy-sensitive posture. Mistral Large itself is closed-source, though earlier Mistral and Mixtral models are open-weight.
